calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ronald K. Losch, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs American Express Travel Related Services Company, Inc. and American Express Centurion Services Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Gregory Bronstein.
Amended default was entered on October 22, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 14, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs American Express Travel Related Services Company, Inc. and American Express Centurion Services Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $105,712.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,744.50.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $469.00, for a total of $116,925.51.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
